verdict_reason: Test isolation violation: beforeAll shares mutable referenceNumber across tests in the describe block. The nested 'amend entry points' group depends on this shared state, while other tests create their own data, creating inconsistent test dependencies.

todos.issue: beforeAll shares mutable referenceNumber across tests, violating test isolation. Tests at lines 24-30 depend on this shared state, but tests at lines 34-111 create their own data.
todos.fix: Move the submitNotification() into beforeEach() for the nested describe at line 19, removing the beforeAll. For the remaining tests (lines 34, 57, 73), they already create their own data correctly.
